title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released V4, a flagship model that significantly reduces inference compute and cost demands while maintaining intelligence. The analysis compares open and closed lab incentives in LLM development, framing V4 as advancing the efficiency-intelligence tradeoff in the broader AI competition between nations.
